title: KEEP - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES BEAVERTON KEEP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports families by promoting child well-being and preventing placement breakdowns. Offers 16 weekly, 90-minute sessions either in-person or remote. 8285 SW Nimbus Avenue Suite 148 Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: ODHS resource/foster and kinship parents with children ages 3-17 Hours: Varies (503) 352-3260 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (503) 352-3260 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: $25 per household per session DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups In Person Support Groups * Foster Parents Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES BEAVERTON
